name: google-earth
description: Google Earth satellite imagery restoration — CONFIRMED WORKING. On-car proxy serves dbRoot + auth locally, forwards tiles to kh.google.com via plain HTTP. No PC required.
author: dspl1236
scripts: ge_deploy.sh - Deploy: install on-car proxy + patched binaries
ge_probe.sh - SAFE: Probe GEMMI state, check patches, verify connectivity
ge_restore.sh - SAFE: Revert all changes, restore original binary
recommended_flow: 1. Ensure working internet (LTE, WiFi, USB ethernet — any method)
2. Build SD card from web app (dspl1236.github.io/MMI3G-Toolkit/app/)
3. Insert SD card, wait ~1 minute for deploy
4. Eject SD card, hard reboot MMI
5. Open Google Earth from map menu — satellite imagery!
6. If issues: run ge_probe.sh to diagnose, ge_restore.sh to revert

technical.proxy: gemmi_proxy v5 — on-car HTTP server (dlopen libsocket.so.2, gethostbyname DNS, plain HTTP tile forwarding)
technical.tiles: Plain HTTP from kh.google.com (no SSL needed)
